channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gamedeveloper.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gamedeveloper.com

item.title: Windrose surpasses 1M sales within a week
item.content:encoded:
Newsbrief: Windrose, the pirate adventure survival game developed by Kraken Express, has sold one million copies in its first six days since launch.

Announced by the studio via Steam, Kraken achieved the milestone within a week of the game's release on April 14. Moreover, on April 19, Windrose accrued over 200,000 concurrent players.

"Your support for the game is absolutely astonishing, and your patience while we are working on fixes is truly heart-warming," reads the announcement. "While we keep working on the game, we read your reviews and comments, watch your videos and streams, and sometimes, honestly, shed a pirate-y tear of happiness, because now when the game is out you share our dream of swashbuckling adventure."

Windrose sold 500,000 copies in its first 48 hours. Since then, the team has been busy releasing hotfixes and addressing issues around Steam Cloud Saves and IPS-related problems, as well as implementing "experimental automatic save backups" to prevent data loss.

Related:Xbox is slashing the price of Game Pass

About the Author

Contributing Editor, News, GameDeveloper.com

Diego Nicolás Argüello is a freelance journalist and critic from Argentina. Video games helped him to learn English, so now he covers them for places like The New York Times, NPR, Rolling Stone, and more. He also runs Into the Spine, a site dedicated to fostering and supporting new writers, and co-hosted Turnabout Breakdown, a podcast about the Ace Attorney series. He’s most likely playing a rhythm game as you read this.



https://www.gamedeveloper.com/business/windrose-surpasses-1m-sales-within-a-week
